name: Factorial Energy Inc.
business: The company is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, or reorganization or engaging in any other similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. It has no operating history and no revenues, and has not yet identified a target business. The company currently has two executive officers and does not intend to have any full-time employees prior to the consummation of a business combination.
